summary: Dashboard radar projection now has a dedicated model boundary; React renders readonly nodes, links, grid, and styles from that model instead of owning projection logic.
fit: Keeps the dashboard as a readonly observation surface while separating projection/state semantics from React/SVG rendering under the confirmed TypeScript agent-state CLI baseline.
implementation_focus: Added src/dashboard/src/radar-model.ts for node/link/grid projection and style helpers; AcceptanceRadarNet now observes dimensions and renders the model; dashboard tests cover passed aggregate, current gap, and evidence node projection.
next: Use this apply record as architecture context when recording Product AC evidence.
